title: Calabar, Cross River — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Calabar, Cross River: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Calabar is a city in Cross River with a population of 520,000. A historic port city in southeastern Nigeria, known for its colonial architecture, annual carnival, and tourism.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
